Kartikey A. Pradhan, Esq. and Katherine Catlos, Esq. 415-926-7600 Kaufman Dolowich Voluck for Defendant Urban Pacific Properties, Inc.

RULING - The matter is not contested per the representation of both counsel in open court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT URBAN PACIFIC PROPERTIES, INC.'S Amended MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT.

Defendant's motion to strike is granted with 20 days leave to amend. The court grants defendants' request for judicial notice as stipulated. Plaintiff waived all of his individual claims in his severance agreement and there is no contention that the agreement is unenforceable. Plaintiff has leave to amend to remove all individual claims and allegations and replead this case as a representative PAGA action.

Counsel for the prevailing party to prepare a proposed form of order which repeats the Court's ruling verbatim.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman,Court Reporter: Noelle Krawiec, CSR #14255, 661-607-5707, noelleckrawiec@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
